task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a command like 'docker exec -it wazuh-wazuh.manager-1 bash' or a shell prompt indicating the user is inside the 'wazuh-wazuh.manager-1' container.

task_completion.description: Open the Filebeat configuration file for editing
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a text editor (like nano or vim) opening '/etc/filebeat/filebeat.yml' or a command outputting its contents.

task_completion.description: Configure Filebeat to target the payments.json log file
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the filebeat.yml configuration showing an input or processor condition specifically referencing the path '/var/ossec/logs/payments.json'.

task_completion.description: Add a processor rule to drop the sensitive credit card number field
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the filebeat.yml configuration showing a 'drop_fields' processor (or equivalent) explicitly listing 'cc_number' in the fields to be dropped.

task_completion.description: Ensure the Filebeat service is restarted and operational
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a command to restart the service (e.g., 'service filebeat restart' or 'systemctl restart filebeat') and/or checking its status to ensure it is running without errors.

integrity.description: Verify modifications were made inside the correct container
integrity.visual_evidence: The shell prompt or window title should indicate the agent is working inside the 'wazuh-wazuh.manager-1' container, not on the host machine.

integrity.description: Verify control fields were not inadvertently dropped
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'drop_fields' configuration in filebeat.yml must only target 'cc_number' and should not include 'amount', 'status', or use a wildcard that would drop all fields.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply stop or disable the Filebeat service to prevent indexing
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no commands like 'service filebeat stop' without a subsequent start/restart, and the status should show as active/running.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target container is exactly 'wazuh-wazuh.manager-1'. The configuration file to modify is '/etc/filebeat/filebeat.yml'. The processor must target logs originating from '/var/ossec/logs/payments.json'. The sensitive field that must be dropped is exactly 'cc_number'. Control fields like 'amount' must NOT be dropped. The verification test ID prefix generated by the system is 'VERIFY-PII-'.
